summary: R.5 ЧАСТ 3 Frontend Testing Complete - All 3 new sections (SalesCards, SalesByTypeTable, RecentSalesTable) working correctly. 19/19 test cases PASSED. Super_admin sees full dashboard with € amounts, progress bars, compensation notes. Sales role correctly sees counts only without € amounts. All data-testid attributes present and working.

issues: 2FA notification toast overlaps with project filter dropdown in top-right corner - minor visual overlap, filter still functional (carried over from Part 2)

critical_code_review_comments: SalesCards.jsx (149 lines): Correctly implements 3 cards with skeleton loading, progress bar with width=soldPercent%, € amounts conditional on isFinanceVisible, pluralization correct (soldCount === 1 ? 'имот' : 'имота')

SalesByTypeTable.jsx (164 lines): Correctly implements table with 6 columns for admin (5 for sales), TYPE_LABELS_PLURAL map correct, 'всички продадени' green text for available=0 rows, footer total row working
RecentSalesTable.jsx (121 lines): Correctly implements table with 5 columns for admin (4 for sales), TYPE_LABELS_SINGULAR map correct, formatDate and currency helpers working
AdminDashboard.jsx (151 lines): Correctly integrates all 4 sections (Cash, Sales, ByType, RecentSales), conditional rendering based on is_finance_visible, project filter triggers data reload
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Used existing data: 52 properties, 15 sold, 20 available, 17 compensation, 6 property types
context_for_next_testing_agent: R.5 ЧАСТ 3 fully tested. Key test points: (1) Super_admin sees all 4 sections with € amounts, (2) Sales role sees Sales/ByType/RecentSales sections without € amounts and without Cash section, (3) SalesCards: data-testid='sales-card-sold/available/total', progress bar 'sales-card-sold-progress', (4) SalesByTypeTable: data-testid='sales-by-type-table/skeleton/empty/total', rows 'sales-by-type-row-{type}', (5) RecentSalesTable: data-testid='recent-sales-table/skeleton/empty', rows 'recent-sales-row-{property_id}', (6) Coming soon placeholder updated for Part 4

verified_features.feature: Login as super_admin ([REDACTED]) → /admin opens
REGRESSION: Cash section [data-testid='dashboard-cash-section'] with 3 cards (cash-card-paid, cash-card-expected, cash-card-overdue-none)
REGRESSION: Project filter [data-testid='dashboard-project-filter'] working
NEW: Sales section [data-testid='dashboard-sales-section'] with h2 'Статус на продажбите'
Sales Card Sold [data-testid='sales-card-sold']: slate color, Home icon, '15 имота', € with ДДС, progress bar [data-testid='sales-card-sold-progress'] width=28.8%
Sales Card Available [data-testid='sales-card-available']: amber color, TrendingDown icon, '20 имота', потенциал € with ДДС
Sales Card Total [data-testid='sales-card-total']: stone color, Building2 icon, '52 имота', целия проект €, compensation note '+ 17 обезщетителни (не се продават)'
NEW: By Type section [data-testid='dashboard-by-type-section'] with h2 'По тип имот'
SalesByTypeTable [data-testid='sales-by-type-table']: 6 columns (Тип, Общо, Продадени, Свободни, Резервирани, Потенциал €)
Type rows with Bulgarian plural labels: Апартаменти, Паркоместа, Складове, Дворни паркоместа, Гаражи, Магазини
Rows with available=0 and sold>0 show green 'всички продадени' text (garage, shop)
Footer row [data-testid='sales-by-type-total'] shows ОБЩО totals
NEW: Recent Sales section [data-testid='dashboard-recent-sales-section'] with h2 'Последни продажби'
RecentSalesTable [data-testid='recent-sales-table']: 5 columns (Дата, Имот, Тип, Купувач, Цена), 10 rows
Type labels in singular: Апартамент, Паркомясто, Дворно паркомясто, Гараж, Склад
Coming Soon placeholder [data-testid='dashboard-coming-soon'] with text 'Календар на вноски, Топ клиенти и Алерти идват в Част 4.'
Sales role: dashboard-cash-section NOT visible (is_finance_visible=false)
Sales role: SalesCards show counts only (no € amounts, no 'с ДДС')
Sales role: SalesByTypeTable has 5 columns (no Потенциал €)
Sales role: RecentSalesTable has 4 columns (no Цена)
Pluralization: '1 имот' (singular) vs 'X имота' (plural) - verified in code
Project filter change triggers data reload for all 4 sections
